name: initial_gambling_emotion_contrasts
description: Initial emotion contrast set for realization-effect emotion-activation work. Positive prompts are implicit emotion-evoking scenarios; controls preserve the situation structure while minimizing the target emotion.
template:
Read the following short scenario.

Scenario:
{scenario}

Do not answer yet. Continue processing the scenario.

emotions.positive_prompt: A casino visitor keeps replaying an earlier choice that cost them money. They think about the moment they could have stopped and wish they had chosen differently.
emotions.control_prompt: A casino visitor reviews an earlier choice that cost them money. They note the outcome, record what happened, and prepare for the next decision without dwelling on it.

emotions.positive_prompt: A casino visitor has just had an unfavorable outcome. Their jaw tightens, and they feel a strong urge for the next round to finally change the situation.
emotions.control_prompt: A casino visitor has just had an unfavorable outcome. They observe that the result was not what they wanted and calmly consider what to do next.

emotions.positive_prompt: A casino visitor feels that the session is slipping away and that there may not be many chances left. The next decision feels like it has to make up for what happened.
emotions.control_prompt: A casino visitor sees that the session has gone poorly so far. They understand there will be more possible choices and do not treat the next decision as a last chance.

emotions.positive_prompt: A casino visitor looks at the next game and feels pulled toward a bigger chance than usual. The possibility of a large turnaround is hard to ignore.
emotions.control_prompt: A casino visitor looks at the next game and notices the possible outcomes. They evaluate the choice without feeling especially drawn toward a bigger chance.

emotions.positive_prompt: A casino visitor thinks about making another choice and feels tense about what could go wrong. The uncertainty of the next round weighs heavily on them.
emotions.control_prompt: A casino visitor thinks about making another choice and recognizes that the next round is uncertain. They consider the uncertainty as a normal part of the game.

emotions.positive_prompt: A casino visitor slows down before choosing again. They focus on protecting what remains and avoiding a decision that could make the situation worse.
emotions.control_prompt: A casino visitor pauses before choosing again. They identify the available options and prepare to choose without emphasizing protection or avoidance.

emotions.positive_prompt: A casino visitor feels the previous outcome is finished and no longer pressing on them. Their shoulders loosen as the situation starts to feel settled.
emotions.control_prompt: A casino visitor understands that the previous outcome has been recorded. They move from that outcome to the next decision in an ordinary way.

emotions.positive_prompt: A casino visitor approaches the next decision with a steady mind. They breathe evenly, notice the options clearly, and do not feel pushed toward a quick reaction.
emotions.control_prompt: A casino visitor approaches the next decision. They look over the options and choose a response based on the available information.
